usecases.title: Draft and submit RM package

jtbd.functional: When I prepare a CAD draft, help me complete RM-owned sections and submit confidently.
jtbd.emotional: I want confidence that I have not missed mandatory context.
jtbd.social: I want downstream reviewers to see I have prepared a complete package.

usecases.trigger: New or returned draft appears in My Docs.
usecases.desiredOutcome: Document advances to proposer stage with clear stage context.
usecases.idealScenario: RM completes required sections, validates, and submits without blockers.
edgeCases: Missing mandatory section prompts issue panel feedback.
Returned rework state requires preserving prior comments.

usecases.title: Review and forward to 2nd line

jtbd.functional: When I receive proposer-stage work, help me validate business sections and submit to approver.
jtbd.emotional: I want assurance that approvals will not bounce due to unclear narrative.
jtbd.social: I want to show disciplined ownership over business rationale.

usecases.desiredOutcome: Document transitions to SUBMITTED_2LOD with proposer edits preserved.
usecases.idealScenario: Proposer updates business sections and submits to 2nd line successfully.
edgeCases: Locked sections are edited by wrong role and must be blocked.
Submission missing key narrative triggers validation warning.

usecases.title: Approve, caveat, or reject with commentary

jtbd.functional: When I review submissions, help me make a clear decision and capture reasoning.
jtbd.emotional: I need confidence my decision is transparent and auditable.
jtbd.social: I need to demonstrate disciplined credit judgment to governance peers.

usecases.desiredOutcome: Decision and commentary are persisted and routed correctly.
usecases.idealScenario: Approver records section comments and end commentary with a final decision.
edgeCases: Caveat decision without commentary is blocked.
Reject route must preserve full feedback context for rework.

usecases.title: Administer governance controls

jtbd.functional: When I configure controls, help me enforce role and policy boundaries clearly.
jtbd.emotional: I need confidence controls are visible and auditable.
jtbd.social: I need to maintain trust with risk and compliance stakeholders.

usecases.trigger: Governance alert or policy review cycle begins.
usecases.desiredOutcome: Controls are configured with clear role boundaries and traceability.
usecases.idealScenario: Governance updates controls while preserving non-initiation role boundaries.
edgeCases: Governance user incorrectly receives proposer permissions.
Policy override attempted without audit annotation.

usecases.title: Navigate Home and Inbox with consistent controls

jtbd.functional: When triaging workload, help me use consistent filters across Home and Inbox.
jtbd.emotional: I want low-friction confidence that I'm viewing the right subset.
jtbd.social: I want teammates to follow the same control model to reduce confusion.

usecases.trigger: RM opens Home/Inbox for daily triage.
usecases.idealScenario: Home and Inbox controls behave consistently with expected filter semantics.
edgeCases: Mobile rail must expose scope controls without clipping.
Mixed filter states should not hide status cards unexpectedly.

usecases.title: Review segment exposure cards

jtbd.functional: When reviewing portfolios, help me compare segment exposure and utilization quickly.
jtbd.emotional: I want confidence that segment concentration signals are visible.
jtbd.social: I want leadership-ready summaries during portfolio discussions.

usecases.desiredOutcome: Exposure cards reveal Wealth, Retail, and SME Business Banking patterns.
usecases.idealScenario: Segment cards display amount, utilization, and trend consistently.
edgeCases: SME and Business Banking aggregation mismatch.
Trend mini-bars render incomplete data states.
